appDescription.message: May the Light Force be with you! Forces dark-themed websites into light mode, leaving originally light websites unaffected.

darkDetected.message: Page detected as dark — applying filter inversion

lightDetected.message: Page is light — checking for dark containers

dynamicDark.message: Page turned dark dynamically — applying filter inversion

daylightActive.message: "Only for day light" is active and system is in dark mode. Skipping.
